Package io.github.lengors.scoutdesk.domain.io.services

Class ObjectMapperFactoryPrioritySpecification

java.lang.Object
io.github.lengors.scoutdesk.domain.io.services.ObjectMapperFactoryPrioritySpecification
All Implemented Interfaces:
LoaderPrioritySpecification<com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.ObjectMapper>, Comparator<com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.ObjectMapper>, Predicate<com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.ObjectMapper>
public class ObjectMapperFactoryPrioritySpecification extends Object implements LoaderPrioritySpecification<com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.ObjectMapper>
A comparator implementation that determines the order of ObjectMapper instances based on the priority of their associated JsonFactory subclasses.

This class is used to specify a custom priority for ObjectMapper instances derived from their factory types. The priority is defined by a list of JsonFactory subclasses provided at instantiation.

  • Constructor Details

    • ObjectMapperFactoryPrioritySpecification

      public ObjectMapperFactoryPrioritySpecification(Collection<Class<? extends com.fasterxml.jackson.core.JsonFactory>> factoryPriorities)
      Constructs a new instance of ObjectMapperFactoryPrioritySpecification with the specified priority order for JsonFactory subclasses. The provided collection of factory priorities determines the order in which ObjectMappers are compared based on their associated JsonFactory types. If the provided collection is empty, the default priority is set to JsonFactory.
      Parameters:
      factoryPriorities - a collection of JsonFactory subclasses to define the custom priority order for ObjectMapper instances; may be empty to use the default priority

  • Method Details

    • compare

      public int compare(com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.ObjectMapper leftMapper, com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.ObjectMapper rightMapper)
      Compares two ObjectMapper instances based on the priority of their associated JsonFactory subclasses. The priority is determined by a predefined list of JsonFactory subclasses.
      Specified by:
      compare in interface Comparator<com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.ObjectMapper>
      Parameters:
      leftMapper - the first ObjectMapper to compare
      rightMapper - the second ObjectMapper to compare
      Returns:
      a negative integer, zero, or a positive integer as the priority of the leftMapper's factory is less than, equal to, or greater than the priority of the rightMapper's factory, respectively

    • test

      public boolean test(com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.ObjectMapper mapper)
      Tests whether the given ObjectMapper can be associated with a factory type that matches the predefined priority criteria.
      Specified by:
      test in interface Predicate<com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.ObjectMapper>
      Parameters:
      mapper - the ObjectMapper to be tested for the presence of a matching factory type
      Returns:
      true if a matching factory type is found; false otherwise
